generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a veteran, I've always believed in being prepared. That's why I support robust civil defense programs. They're not just about national security—they're about protecting our families and communities. Remember the 2024 tornado outbreak? Communities with preparedness plans fared much better. Let's ensure our local governments have the resources they need to keep us safe. #CivilDefenseMatters #CommunitySafety
